cleavage agent: digested overnight with 4 µg of trypsin
enrichment method: purification and fractionation in a SCX StageTip
fractionation method: purification and fractionation in a SCX StageTip
fragmentation method: top 15 precursors were subjected to HCD-based fragmentation
instrument: bench top orbitrap mass spectrometer (Q Exactive HF; Thermo Fisher)
labeling: intensity-based absolute quantification (iBAQ) values were generated
